items.title: Merck’s Heart Pill Slashes Cholesterol Levels in Test Patients
items.description: The daily pill reduced LDL cholesterol by 56% in just six months, among patients whose LDL defy treatment with everyday statin drugs.

items.title: Amgen CEO talks trial results of cardiac drug Repatha
items.description: Amgen Chairman, President and CEO Bob Bradway joins 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer to talk quarterly results, its recent drug trials, what is ahead for the company and more.

items.title: Amgen CEO Bob Bradway goes one-on-one with Jim Cramer
items.description: Amgen Chairman, President and CEO Bob Bradway joins 'Mad Money' host Jim Cramer to talk quarterly results, its recent drug trials, what is ahead for the company and more.

items.title: CEO of drugmaker Amgen talks new results from cholesterol drug trial
items.description: Amgen CEO Bob Bradway told CNBC's Jim Cramer about his company's treatment to reduce heart attack risk.

items.title: Are These 4 Biotech Stocks Set to Beat Q3 Earnings Estimates?
items.description: Alto Neuroscience, Autolus Therapeutics, Ascendis Pharma and Immuneering are gearing up to report Q3 results that could top expectations.
